title: Workflow Status v1
description: Runtime status of a dispatched workflow instance. Producer: Hymenium (single orchestration authority). Consumer: Canopy (coordination ledger), Cap (operator UI), operators. Reflects the full workflow lifecycle including gate blocking, repair, and terminal states.

handoff_path.description: Path to the handoff markdown file that initiated this workflow.

template_id.description: Reference to the workflow template used for this instance.

status.description: Overall workflow status. 'blocked_on_gate' means an entry or exit gate condition failed; see 'blocked_on' for the failing condition. 'awaiting_repair' means a phase output failed verification and is queued for a Repair Worker.

blocked_on.description: When status is 'blocked_on_gate', the gate condition that failed (e.g., 'audit phase exit: no verification evidence'). Omit for other statuses.

current_phase.description: ID of the currently active phase, or null if no phase is active.

phase_id.description: Phase identifier from the workflow template.

role.description: Runtime role name for the agent executing this phase.

agent_id.description: Assigned agent ID (e.g., 'impl/repo/handoff/1') or null if not yet assigned.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this phase started, or null if not started.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this phase completed, or null if not completed.

canopy_task_id.description: Canopy task ID (ULID) tracking this phase, or null if not yet created.

failure_reason.description: If status is 'failed', the reason for the failure. Null otherwise.

retry_count.description: Number of times this phase has been retried.

phases.description: Array of phase statuses in workflow order.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this workflow was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last status update.
